# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The project accepts security fixes for the latest released version and current
main branch.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| Latest release | Yes |
| main branch | Yes |
| Older releases | Best effort |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.

Use one of these channels:

1. GitHub Security Advisory: https://github.com/galihru/orbinex/security/advisories/new
2. Security Policy page: https://github.com/galihru/orbinex/security/policy

Please include:

- A clear description of the issue.
- Reproduction steps or proof of concept.
- Potential impact and affected versions.
- Any suggested remediation.

## Response Targets

- Initial acknowledgment: within 72 hours.
- Triage and severity assessment: within 7 days.
- Fix timeline: depends on impact and complexity.

## Disclosure Process

- We coordinate disclosure with reporters when possible.
- Critical issues are prioritized for hotfix release.
- Public disclosure happens after patch availability.
